hero_subtitle: SFTY helps compliance teams assess and document source of wealth risks within enhanced due diligence workflows by linking provider data, regulatory rules, cases, and audit evidence in one platform.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Source of wealth reviews rely on fragmented data
problem_description: Compliance teams managing enhanced due diligence struggle with disconnected provider outputs and incomplete risk context. This fragmentation slows case reviews, weakens audit trails and complicates defensible source of wealth assessments.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates fragmented provider data, regulatory rules and case actions into one connected workflow so compliance teams can efficiently assess source of wealth risk with clear audit trails and decision context.
workflow_title: From source of wealth review to decision
workflow_description: SFTY guides source of wealth data through risk assessment, case creation, reviewer evaluation and decision logging with evidence for AML compliance control.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented checks. Clear source of wealth control
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects disjointed AML outputs into audit-ready workflows, decisions and evidence to support comprehensive and defensible enhanced due diligence source of wealth reviews.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view

authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for enhanced due diligence?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a compliance layer that connects AML checks, monitoring, and case management to support enhanced due diligence workflows for digital asset businesses such as VASPs.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY structure source of wealth review?
faq_2_answer: SFTY turns fragmented source of wealth data and provider outputs into structured cases, facilitates review workflows, records decisions, and links evidence for clear operational control during enhanced due diligence.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case histories and supporting evidence in an audit-ready format, enabling compliance teams to maintain traceability and support regulatory or internal inspections.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY sits above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and screening providers and connects their outputs into one coordinated compliance workflow without replacing them.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace AML or KYC providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace AML, KYC or other compliance providers but connects their outputs into structured workflows, cases, regulatory rule updates and reporting.
final_title: Structure source of wealth reviews with SFTY
final_description: Review how SFTY connects provider data, regulatory rules, cases and audit evidence into enhanced due diligence workflows.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
